Clvm.doc: is the CLVM allocator and transaction builder. It manages memory for Chialisp programs and accumulates coin spends for a transaction.

new.doc: creates a new CLVM allocator and transaction context.

add_coin_spend.doc: adds a pre-built coin spend to the transaction being constructed.

spend_coin.doc: spends a coin by combining it with a puzzle reveal and solution, adding it to the transaction.

coin_spends.doc: returns all coin spends accumulated in this transaction context.

parse.doc: parses a Chialisp source string into a CLVM program.

deserialize_with_backrefs.doc: deserializes a CLVM program that uses backref compression (CHIP-0002).

cache.doc: caches a serialized program by its tree hash for efficient reuse across spends.

alloc.doc: allocates a typed value as a CLVM program in the allocator.

pair.doc: creates a CLVM cons pair (the fundamental compound structure in Chialisp).

nil.doc: returns the CLVM nil value, representing an empty list or false.

int.doc: allocates an integer as a CLVM atom.

bound_checked_number.doc: allocates a floating-point number as a CLVM atom, with bounds checking to prevent overflow.

string.doc: allocates a UTF-8 string as a CLVM atom.

bool.doc: allocates a boolean as a CLVM program (nil for false, 1 for true).

atom.doc: allocates raw bytes as a CLVM atom.

list.doc: creates a proper CLVM list from a slice of programs, terminated by nil.

delegated_spend.doc: creates a delegated spend from a list of conditions, for use inside standard or inner puzzles.

standard_spend.doc: wraps an inner spend in the standard transaction puzzle (p2_delegated_puzzle_or_hidden_puzzle) for the given synthetic key.

spend_standard_coin.doc: spends a standard XCH coin using the given synthetic key and inner spend, adding it to the transaction.

settlement_spend.doc: creates a settlement puzzle spend for atomic swaps, paying to the given notarized payments.

spend_settlement_coin.doc: spends a settlement coin in an offer with the given notarized payments.

spend_cats.doc: spends one or more CAT (Chia Asset Token) coins together, enforcing the TAIL rules and lineage proofs.

mint_nfts.doc: mints new NFTs as children of the given parent coin, returning the minted NFT singletons.

spend_nft.doc: spends an NFT singleton with the given inner spend (for transfer, metadata update, etc.), returning the updated NFT state.

create_eve_did.doc: creates the initial (eve) DID singleton from a parent coin, establishing a new decentralized identity on chain.

spend_did.doc: spends a DID singleton with the given inner spend, returning the updated DID state or nil if melted.

spend_option.doc: spends an option contract with the given inner spend, returning the updated contract state or nil if exercised.

spend_streamed_asset.doc: spends a streamed (vesting) asset, either claiming unlocked funds or clawing back the remainder.

mint_vault.doc: mints a new MIPS vault singleton with the given custody hash and memos.

create_bulletin.doc: creates a bulletin board singleton for publishing on-chain messages.

mips_spend.doc: creates a MIPS vault spend that wraps a delegated spend with the vault's custody rules.

nft_metadata.doc: encodes NFT metadata (data URIs, metadata URIs, license URIs, etc.) as a CLVM program.

mips_memo.doc: encodes a MIPS vault memo as a CLVM program for embedding in coin hints.

inner_puzzle_memo.doc: encodes an inner puzzle memo as a CLVM program.

restriction_memo.doc: encodes a vault restriction memo as a CLVM program.

wrapper_memo.doc: encodes a vault wrapper memo as a CLVM program.

force_1_of_2_restricted_variable_memo.doc: encodes a force-1-of-2 restricted variable memo as a CLVM program.

memo_kind.doc: encodes a memo kind tag as a CLVM program.

member_memo.doc: encodes a vault member memo as a CLVM program.

m_of_n_memo.doc: encodes an M-of-N multisig configuration memo as a CLVM program.

option_metadata.doc: encodes option contract metadata as a CLVM program.

payment.doc: encodes a payment (puzzle hash, amount, and optional memos) as a CLVM program.

notarized_payment.doc: encodes a notarized payment (used in offer settlements) as a CLVM program.

remark.doc: creates a REMARK condition that embeds arbitrary data in the spend without affecting validation.

agg_sig_parent.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_PARENT condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the parent coin ID.

agg_sig_puzzle.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_PUZZLE condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the puzzle hash.

agg_sig_amount.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_AMOUNT condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the coin amount.

agg_sig_puzzle_amount.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_PUZZLE_AMOUNT condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the puzzle hash and amount.

agg_sig_parent_amount.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_PARENT_AMOUNT condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the parent coin ID and amount.

agg_sig_parent_puzzle.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_PARENT_PUZZLE condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the parent coin ID and puzzle hash.

agg_sig_unsafe.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_UNSAFE condition requiring a BLS signature with no domain separation. Use with caution.

agg_sig_me.doc: creates an AGG_SIG_ME condition requiring a BLS signature scoped to the full coin ID.

create_coin.doc: creates a CREATE_COIN condition that produces a new coin with the given puzzle hash, amount, and optional memos.

reserve_fee.doc: creates a RESERVE_FEE condition that requires the transaction to include at least the given fee.

create_coin_announcement.doc: creates a CREATE_COIN_ANNOUNCEMENT condition for inter-coin communication within a spend bundle.

create_puzzle_announcement.doc: creates a CREATE_PUZZLE_ANNOUNCEMENT condition for inter-coin communication scoped to the puzzle hash.

assert_coin_announcement.doc: creates an ASSERT_COIN_ANNOUNCEMENT condition that requires a matching coin announcement in the spend bundle.

assert_puzzle_announcement.doc: creates an ASSERT_PUZZLE_ANNOUNCEMENT condition that requires a matching puzzle announcement in the spend bundle.

assert_concurrent_spend.doc: creates an ASSERT_CONCURRENT_SPEND condition requiring another coin to be spent in the same block.

assert_concurrent_puzzle.doc: creates an ASSERT_CONCURRENT_PUZZLE condition requiring a coin with this puzzle hash to be spent in the same block.

assert_seconds_relative.doc: creates an ASSERT_SECONDS_RELATIVE condition requiring the given number of seconds since coin creation.

assert_seconds_absolute.doc: creates an ASSERT_SECONDS_ABSOLUTE condition requiring the blockchain timestamp to be at least the given value.

assert_height_relative.doc: creates an ASSERT_HEIGHT_RELATIVE condition requiring the given number of blocks since coin creation.

assert_height_absolute.doc: creates an ASSERT_HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE condition requiring the blockchain height to be at least the given value.

assert_before_seconds_relative.doc: creates an ASSERT_BEFORE_SECONDS_RELATIVE condition requiring the spend to occur within the given seconds since coin creation.

assert_before_seconds_absolute.doc: creates an ASSERT_BEFORE_SECONDS_ABSOLUTE condition requiring the spend to occur before the given timestamp.

assert_before_height_relative.doc: creates an ASSERT_BEFORE_HEIGHT_RELATIVE condition requiring the spend to occur within the given blocks since coin creation.

assert_before_height_absolute.doc: creates an ASSERT_BEFORE_HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE condition requiring the spend to occur before the given block height.

assert_my_coin_id.doc: creates an ASSERT_MY_COIN_ID condition that validates the coin's own ID.

assert_my_parent_id.doc: creates an ASSERT_MY_PARENT_ID condition that validates the coin's parent coin ID.

assert_my_puzzle_hash.doc: creates an ASSERT_MY_PUZZLEHASH condition that validates the coin's own puzzle hash.

assert_my_amount.doc: creates an ASSERT_MY_AMOUNT condition that validates the coin's own amount.

assert_my_birth_seconds.doc: creates an ASSERT_MY_BIRTH_SECONDS condition that validates the timestamp when the coin was created.

assert_my_birth_height.doc: creates an ASSERT_MY_BIRTH_HEIGHT condition that validates the block height when the coin was created.

assert_ephemeral.doc: creates an ASSERT_EPHEMERAL condition requiring the coin to be created and spent within the same block.

send_message.doc: creates a SEND_MESSAGE condition (CHIP-0025) for cross-coin communication with the given mode and message.

receive_message.doc: creates a RECEIVE_MESSAGE condition (CHIP-0025) to receive a cross-coin message with the given mode and content.

softfork.doc: creates a SOFTFORK condition for forward-compatible consensus rule extensions, consuming the given cost.

melt_singleton.doc: creates a condition that destroys a singleton, permanently removing it from the coin set.

transfer_nft.doc: creates NFT transfer conditions including royalty trade price information and the new owner's singleton.

run_cat_tail.doc: creates a condition that runs a CAT's TAIL (Token And Asset Issuance Limiter) program to validate issuance rules.

update_nft_metadata.doc: creates a condition that updates an NFT's on-chain metadata using the updater puzzle.

update_data_store_merkle_root.doc: creates a condition that updates a DataLayer store's merkle root hash.

parse_child_streamed_asset.doc: parses a coin spend to extract the child streamed (vesting) asset state.

parse_child_medieval_vault.doc: parses a coin spend to extract the child medieval vault state, if present.

spend_medieval_vault.doc: spends a medieval vault with the given public keys, conditions, and genesis challenge.

spend_medieval_vault_unsafe.doc: spends a medieval vault with a raw delegated spend, bypassing condition building. Use with caution.

medieval_vault_rekey_delegated_puzzle.doc: creates the delegated puzzle for rekeying a medieval vault to new M-of-N parameters.

medieval_vault_send_message_delegated_pu.doc: creates the delegated puzzle for sending a cross-vault message from a medieval vault.

reward_distributor_from_spend.doc: parses a coin spend to reconstruct a reward distributor's state, if it matches the expected format.

reward_distributor_from_parent_spend.doc: reconstructs a reward distributor's state from its parent coin's spend.

reward_distributor_from_eve_coin_spend.doc: reconstructs a reward distributor from its initial (eve) coin spend and genesis state.

launch_reward_distributor.doc: creates the coin spends to launch a new reward distributor from an offer, configuring epochs and CAT refund.

create_offer_security_coin.doc: creates a security coin for an offer to prevent unauthorized spend bundle manipulation.

spend_offer_security_coin.doc: spends an offer security coin with the given conditions, returning the required BLS signature.

spend_settlement_nft.doc: spends a settlement NFT from an offer, transferring it to the destination puzzle hash.

offer_settlement_cats.doc: extracts the settlement CAT coins from an offer spend bundle for a given asset ID.

offer_settlement_nft.doc: extracts the settlement NFT from an offer spend bundle for a given launcher ID.

parse_vault_transaction.doc: parses a vault spend reveal and its associated coin spends into a structured vault transaction.
